docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAQUIZA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT JOSON, NEIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. IF NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES AT THIS HEARING MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSON, NEIL
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAQUIZA, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR 27, 2018 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, MATTER IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 24, 2018 AT 10:00 AM. IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. IF CASE SETTLED, NO APPEARANCE IS NECESSARY AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506
